mapper.select:
SELECT mbm.BPA_ID ,cgcm.CD_DSC AS TASK_NM ,mbm.DESCRIPTION ,mbm.EXCEL_YN ,mbm.PERIOD_CD ,TO_CHAR(mbm.REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGST_DTTM ,cgcm.USG_YN FROM MSP_BPA_MST mbm , CMN_GRP_CD_MST cgcm WHERE mbm.BPA_ID = cgcm.CD_VAL AND cgcm.GRP_ID = 'BPA0001'
AND cgcm.USG_YN = 'Y'
AND mbm.BPA_ID = #{bpaId}
ORDER BY cgcm.USG_YN DESC, cgcm.ETC1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MSP_BPA_MST WHERE BPA_ID = #{bpaId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_BPA_UPLOAD_INFO WHERE BPA_ID = #{BPA_ID} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT SVC_CNTR_NO ,TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_BPA_UPLOAD_INFO WHERE BPA_ID = #{bpaId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SEQ
SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
